title: 天皇賞（春）の後に・光風霽月

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf has reclaimed her honor after the
exhibition race, but she has no intention of
stopping here. She sets her sights on the Japan
Cup.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But this time, she isn't putting herself under as
much pressure. She even has enough free time to
enjoy a trip to a teahouse with me.
